meaning: n.崇拜,爱慕,受崇拜(或爱慕)的对象
examples: She needs and wants to be loved with overwhelming passion and adoration.
He gazed at her with pure adoration.
For me, my adoration goes beyond her movies.
Once Brahms was set up as Wagner's adversary, he drew vilification or adoration according to allegiance.
But the outbreak of adoration for the shares are providing no lift for the share price.
